title: hartia villosa var. grandifolia
intro: Hartia villosa var. grandifolia, also known as the large-leaved hartia, is a variant of the Hartia villosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hartia villosa var. grandifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
